list.title: Compose Projects
list.description: Manage Imported Compose Projects Without Duplicating Runtime Authority.
list.tableHint: Project Registry Owns Files and Lifecycle; Runtime Facts Stay in Container Authority.
list.emptyDescription: Import an Existing Compose Project to Start Reviewing Overview, Services, Configuration, and Activity.
list.emptyFilteredDescription: No Projects Match the Current Filters.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search Display Name, Canonical Name, or Working Directory

actions.destroyConfirm: Destroy {name}? This Only Works When Ownership Guard Allows It.

import.description: Select a server directory, let the backend inspect it automatically, and confirm the discovered Compose project before import.

form.title: Project Details
form.canonicalProjectNameOverridePlaceholder: Leave Blank to Keep the Inspected Value

picker.title: Select Server Directory
picker.emptyDescription: You Can Import This Directory as Is or Go Back Up to Browse Another Path.
picker.truncatedNotice: Showing the first {count} directories only. Open a subdirectory to keep browsing.

preview.title: Import Preview
preview.noDiagnostics: No Additional Warnings or Conflicts Were Returned.

state.awaitingSelectionDescription: Inspect runs automatically after directory selection and fills the import preview for confirmation.

messages.directoryLoadFailed: Directory List Could Not Be Loaded.

create.title: Project Source Boundaries
create.description: Inspect Managed, Git, Template, and Remote Host source boundaries. Import and Managed Create remain the real user entrypoints.

root.readyHint: This Create Flow Will Materialize Files Under {directory}, and Project Authority Will Own the Working Directory and Snapshot.
root.unavailableHint: The Managed Root Authority Is Not Available Yet. Repair the Upstream System Config Before Creating Projects.

form.title: Project Basics
form.envFileNamePlaceholder: Leave Blank to Skip Writing an Env File

validation.title: Authority and Path Preview
validation.canonicalProjectNamePattern: Canonical Project Name May Only Use Letters, Numbers, Dots, Underscores, and Hyphens.
validation.relativeDirectoryPattern: The Relative Project Directory Must Stay Under the Managed Root and Cannot Traverse Upward.
validation.envFileNamePattern: Env File Name Cannot Include Path Separators.

editors.title: Compose and Env Editors
editors.composeDescription: This Editor Owns the Initial Phase 2 Compose YAML Without Pulling in Diff, Deploy, or Runtime Persistence.
editors.envDescription: The Env File Is Optional. Leave the File Name Blank to Skip Writing It in This Round.
editors.envPlaceholder: Enter Env File Content, for Example KEY=value
editors.envEmpty: No Env Content Yet. It Can Stay Empty.

messages.rootLoadFailed: Managed Root Authority Could Not Be Loaded.

descriptions.managed: Create a managed Compose project in the configured managed root directory.
descriptions.git: Git-based project creation is not available yet.
descriptions.template: Template-based project creation is not available yet.
descriptions.remoteHost: Remote host project creation is not available yet.

statusReason.managedUnconfigured: Managed Root Is Not Configured Yet. Managed Create Is Implemented, but the Current Environment Cannot Create Projects Directly.
statusReason.managedInvalid: Managed Root Configuration Is Invalid. Repair the Upstream System Config Before Using Managed Create.
statusReason.managedUnknown: Managed Root Status Is Unknown. Review System Config and Refresh Authority First.
statusReason.planned: This Source Only Has Contract and Route Boundaries Today. Materialization Will Land in a Later Bounded Batch.

messages.loadFailed: Project Source Catalog Could Not Be Loaded.

discovery.description: Read bounded local directory-scan and auto-discovery candidate previews under the managed root without auto-registering projects or changing runtime authority.
discovery.loadFailed: Project Discovery Candidates Could Not Be Loaded.
discovery.capabilitiesReady: Local Scan and Auto-discovery Preview Are Enabled
discovery.capabilitiesBlocked: Current Authority Does Not Allow Candidate Scanning
discovery.emptyDescription: No previewable Compose project candidates were found under the current authority root.
discovery.unavailableDescription: No discovery preview payload was returned. Refresh the authority and try again.

createPlanned.description: This Source Boundary Is Registered in Phase 3 Batch 1, but Materialization Work Stays in a Later Batch.
createPlanned.notice: This Entry Only Fixes Route, Permission, and Metadata Ownership in the Current Batch.
createPlanned.boundaryValue: No Git Clone, Template Instantiation, Directory Scan, Remote Host Execution, Secret Persistence, or Backend Activity Aggregation Is Executed Here.

detail.description: Project Summary, Runtime Member Links, Read-only Configuration, and Frontend Activity Fan-out.

services.title: Declared Services
services.summary: {count} Services Declared in the Latest Snapshot.
services.emptyDescription: Refresh the Project Snapshot to Inspect Declared Services.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.summary: Phase 2 Keeps Metadata, Draft Editing, Diff, Validate, and Deploy Under Project Authority Without Adding Runtime Persistence.
configuration.composeEditorDescription: Edit the Managed Compose Draft Here. Deploy Writes Back to the Tracked Project Files and Then Refreshes the Snapshot.
configuration.envEditorDescription: Edit the Optional Env Draft Here. The Project Module Still Owns the Tracked File Boundary.
configuration.diffEmpty: Run Diff to Compare the Current Managed Files With the Proposed Draft.
configuration.diffHasChanges: The Draft Diff Contains File Changes.
configuration.diffNoChanges: The Draft Matches the Current Managed Files.
configuration.validationEmpty: Run Validate to Inspect the Normalized Draft and Declared Services.
configuration.deployConfirmDescription: Deploying this draft will overwrite the tracked managed files, refresh the project snapshot, and run docker compose up -d.
configuration.managedAuthorityHint: This Is a Managed Project. Draft Editing, Diff, Validate, and Deploy Stay Under Project-owned Configuration Authority.
configuration.externalAuthorityHint: This Flow Only Applies to Managed Projects. External Projects Stay on the Read-only Configuration Surface.
configuration.copyError: Configuration Content Could Not Be Copied.
configuration.previewEmpty: No Normalized Preview Is Available Yet.
configuration.fileEmpty: Select One Compose or Env File to Preview Its Content.

activity.title: Frontend Activity Fan-out
activity.summary: This View Fans Out Existing Container Logs and Events Without Adding Project-level Backend Aggregation.
activity.authorityFrontendFanout: Frontend fan-out over existing container logs and events remains the canonical activity authority for local projects.
activity.authorityBackendPlanned: Backend project activity aggregation remains planned only. Remote-host and cross-container rollups are not implemented in this batch.
activity.emptyDescription: This Project Currently Has No Runtime Container Members to Fan Out.
activity.loadFailed: Project Activity Could Not Be Loaded.
